figures.caption: Table 1: Aggregate The Well MHD_64 metrics over ten random seeds. Values are mean with two-sided 95% confidence intervals in parentheses. Lower is better for all metrics
Figure 1: Aggregate The Well MHD_64 diagnostics, normalized by the best model for each metric. Lower is better

Figure 3: Aggregate magnetic-divergence L2 diagnostic on The Well MHD_64 over ten random seeds. Error bars show two-sided 95% confidence intervals. CSNO obtains the lowest mean magnetic-divergence error among the three models
Table 2: ConStellaration equilibrium-regression metrics over ten random seeds. Values are mean with two-sided 95% confidence intervals in parentheses. Lower is better for all metrics

Figure 4: Aggregate autoregressive rollout behavior on The Well MHD_64 over ten random seeds. Error bars show two-sided 95% confidence intervals. CSNO obtains the lowest mean rollout relative L2 error despite not having the lowest one-step pointwise error
Figure 5: Aggregate isotropic three-dimensional spectral error on The Well MHD_64 over ten random seeds. Error bars show two-sided 95% confidence intervals. CSNO obtains the lowest spectral error
